MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

Plaintiff Debt Management Partners, LLC's motion for entry of judgment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 and the parties' July 2022 agreement, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC'S Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is Transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar in room 301 on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Plaintiff's Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Motion is denied. The Promissory Note and Arbitration Agreement requires that this dispute be arbitrated.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the pro tem judge at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
